sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise Line opens bookings for Norwegian Aura, Its largest ship to date
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line (NCL) has opened bookings for its newest and largest ship, Norwegian Aura, set to debut in May 2027. The vessel will be 10% larger than previous ships, accommodating up to 3,840 guests, and will feature new amenities like Ocean Heights and an enhanced Haven. After an inaugural Mediterranean voyage, it will homeport in Miami for year-round Caribbean sailings, including calls to Great Stirrup Cay.

feed.title: Barclays Upgrades SiTime (SITM)
feed.summary: Barclays has upgraded its outlook for SiTime (SITM) from Underweight to Equal-Weight. Analyst forecasts suggest a 0.13% upside with an average one-year price target of $349.65/share, and the company is projected to see a 73.93% increase in annual revenue to $490MM. Institutional ownership also increased, with a bullish put/call ratio of 0.48.

feed.title: Insider Selling: D-Wave Quantum (NYSE:QBTS) CEO Sells 35,013 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: D-Wave Quantum Inc.'s CEO, Alan Baratz, sold 35,013 shares of company stock for approximately $982,465 on January 14th, reducing his ownership by 1.33%. Following the news, shares dropped 4.6% to $28.75. Despite the sale, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus target price of $33.67, after the company reported strong revenue growth and an EPS beat in its last quarterly earnings.

feed.title: Trailblazer Merger Signs Promissory Note Amendment With Trailblazer Sponsor Group
feed.summary: Trailblazer Merger Corp. has amended its promissory note with Trailblazer Sponsor Group, increasing it by $250,000 to a total of $4,830,000. This amendment, signed on January 14, 2026, aims to provide additional liquidity to support the company's ongoing needs as it advances its proposed business combination. The increased borrowing capacity will help the company during the pending business combination.

feed.title: USA Compression Partners Announces Fourth-Quarter 2025 Distribution; Fourth-Quarter 2025 Earnings Release and Conference Call Scheduled for February 17
feed.summary: USA Compression Partners, LP (USAC) has announced a cash distribution of $0.525 per common unit for the fourth quarter of 2025, payable on February 6, 2026. The company will also release its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings and host an investor conference call on February 17 to discuss its financial and operating results. USA Compression is a leading independent provider of natural gas compression services, primarily focusing on midstream applications.

feed.title: Northwest Natural Holding Company Declares $0.4925 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Northwest Natural Holding Company has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.4925 per share, payable on February 13, 2026, setting its annual dividend rate at $1.97 per share. The company provides energy and water services to over one million users across seven states and has been recognized for its ethical practices. Wall Street analysts forecast a moderate buy for NWN, with an average 1-year price target of $52.50.

feed.title: RCM Technologies, Inc. (RCMT) outperforms broader market: What you need to know
feed.summary: RCM Technologies, Inc. (RCMT) stock has outperformed the broader market this year, returning 6.64% compared to the S&P 500's 6.07%. The stock also demonstrated stronger growth over the last 12 weeks and 52 weeks. Despite these gains, analysts currently have a consensus Hold rating on RCMT, with an average target price indicating a potential downside.

feed.title: Alliance Entertainment and Processa Pharmaceuticals Interviews to Air on the RedChip Small Stocks, Big Money(TM) Show on Bloomberg TV
feed.summary: RedChip Companies will broadcast interviews with Alliance Entertainment Holding Corp. (Nasdaq:AENT) and Processa Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq:PCSA) on the "RedChip Small Stocks, Big Money" show on Bloomberg TV. Alliance Entertainment's Executive Chairman, Bruce Ogilvie, will discuss the company's position in the entertainment and pop culture collectibles market and its growth strategies. David Young, President of Research and Development at Processa Pharmaceuticals, will provide an update on their Next Generation Cancer (NGC) platform and Phase 2 study of NGC-Cap for breast cancer.

feed.title: Infovista recognized in the 2025 Gartner® Market Guide for CSP Service and Network Assurance Solutions
feed.summary: Infovista has been recognized for the fourth consecutive year in the 2025 Gartner Market Guide for CSP Service and Network Assurance Solutions. The report highlights the increasing adoption of Agentic AI and autonomous network ambitions in the assurance market, with vendors developing capabilities for closed-loop automation. Infovista's Ativa™ automated assurance solution focuses on translating natural-language intent into context-aware automated actions, enabling CSPs to move towards autonomous operations with human oversight.

feed.title: 3M Co. (MMM) call put ratio 1.4 calls to 1 put into quarter results
feed.summary: 3M Co. (MMM) has a call-put ratio of 1.4 calls to 1 put as it approaches its Q4 earnings release. The January 23 weekly $170 straddle is priced for a 7% move, with earnings expected before the bell on January 20. The stock's current price is $171.10, and it has an overall analyst rating of SELL.

feed.title: MLM: B. Riley Securities Initiates Coverage with Neutral Rating
feed.summary: B. Riley Securities has initiated coverage on Martin Marietta Materials (MLM) with a Neutral rating and has set a price target of $700.00 USD. This new rating comes amidst varying analyst opinions, with some downgrading to Neutral and others maintaining or upgrading their Buy/Overweight ratings with increased price targets. Martin Marietta Materials is a leading producer of construction aggregates in the U.S., with an average analyst target price of $682.27, suggesting an upside from its current price, though GuruFocus estimates a potential downside based on its GF Value.

feed.title: Coca‑Cola’s pivotal year: Portfolio shifts and a new CEO
feed.summary: Coca-Cola experienced a turbulent but profitable 2025, marked by strategic shifts and the upcoming CEO transition to Henrique Braun. Despite challenges like the underperformance of Costa Coffee, the company demonstrated strong retail execution and portfolio diversification, focusing on low-sugar options and leveraging data for market shaping. Moving into 2026, Coca-Cola aims to capitalize on wellness trends and digital engagement while addressing competition in high-function beverage categories.

feed.title: Stephens Inc. AR Has $3.77 Million Stock Holdings in Rambus, Inc. $RMBS
feed.summary: Stephens Inc. AR significantly increased its stake in Rambus, Inc. (NASDAQ:RMBS) by 923.9% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 36,142 shares valued at $3.77 million. This move is part of a broader trend of strong institutional interest, with major investors like EdgePoint and Geode Capital also increasing their positions. Despite a recent earnings per share miss, analysts maintain a "Buy" rating for Rambus, with an average price target of $108.14, signaling optimism for the semiconductor company's future growth.

feed.title: 89M deal boosts Invitation Homes' rental building in Southeast states
feed.summary: Invitation Homes (INVH) has acquired ResiBuilt Homes, a build-to-rent developer, for $89 million plus potential earn-out payments. This acquisition aims to enhance Invitation Homes' development capabilities, allowing them to deliver more high-quality housing solutions in high-growth markets across the Southeast, including Georgia, Florida, and the Carolinas. The deal is expected to be modestly accretive to the Company’s 2026 AFFO per share and includes options to acquire approximately 1,500 well-located lots for future development.

feed.title: D.R. Horton Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
feed.summary: D.R. Horton (NYSE: DHI) is set to release its first-quarter earnings on January 20th, with analysts forecasting lower EPS and revenue compared to the previous year. Ahead of the earnings call, several prominent analysts have revised their ratings and price targets for DHI, reflecting mixed sentiment. The company's previous quarterly results showed revenue exceeding estimates but earnings falling short.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (PNC) The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. Reports Q4 Revenue $6.07B, vs. FactSet Est of $5.96B
feed.summary: The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. reported its Q4 revenue, reaching $6.07 billion. This figure surpassed FactSet's estimated revenue of $5.96 billion for the quarter. The article highlights other recent news regarding PNC Financial Services, including earnings, share performance, and senior notes redemption.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Price Target on Insulet to $363 From $365, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has adjusted its price target for Insulet (PODD) to $363, down from $365, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This update reflects a slight modification in the firm's outlook for the medical devices company. Concurrently, Insulet is scheduled to present at the 44th Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 13, 2026.

feed.title: Copart Inc.: The Quiet Tech Powerhouse Rebuilding How Cars Get Resold
feed.summary: Copart Inc. has transformed the vehicle remarketing industry by creating a global, online, software-driven marketplace for salvage, wholesale, and used vehicles. The company's platform offers deep integration with insurers' workflows, large-scale logistics, transparent data, international reach, and a digital-first user experience. This specialized focus, coupled with strong network effects and robust technology, gives Copart a significant competitive advantage and contributes to its high market valuation.

feed.title: Manning & Napier Advisors LLC Sells 3,585 Shares of Rockwell Automation, Inc. $ROK
feed.summary: Manning & Napier Advisors LLC reduced its stake in Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE:ROK) by 70.4% in the third quarter, selling 3,585 shares and holding 1,510 shares valued at $528,000. Despite this reduction, analysts generally hold a "Moderate Buy" rating for ROK with an average price target of $406.44, and the company recently beat EPS estimates and increased its quarterly dividend. Insider selling activity has also been noted, with 88,053 shares sold over the last 90 days, even as the stock trades near its 52-week high with a high P/E ratio.

feed.title: PNC Reports Full Year 2025 Net Income of $7.0 Billion, $16.59 Diluted EPS
feed.summary: PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. reported a full-year 2025 net income of $7.0 billion, with diluted EPS of $16.59, driven by record revenue and a 5% positive operating leverage. The company's fourth-quarter net income was $2.0 billion, and it successfully closed the FirstBank acquisition on January 5, 2026. PNC also announced increased planned share repurchases and healthy growth in net interest income, net interest margin, and noninterest income, alongside increases in loans and deposits.

feed.title: Las Vegas Sands Corp. $LVS Shares Sold by Manning & Napier Advisors LLC
feed.summary: Manning & Napier Advisors LLC significantly reduced its stake in Las Vegas Sands Corp. (LVS) by 84.6% in Q3, selling over 50,000 shares, even as other institutional investors like Norges Bank and Vanguard Group increased their holdings. Despite heavy insider selling from executives including Miriam Adelson and Patrick Dumont, the company beat Q3 earnings and revenue estimates and maintains a $1.00 annual dividend. Analyst ratings are generally positive, with a consensus price target around $68.52, suggesting confidence in the stock's future performance.

feed.title: Manning & Napier Advisors LLC Decreases Stock Position in Labcorp Holdings Inc. $LH
feed.summary: Manning & Napier Advisors LLC significantly reduced its stake in Labcorp Holdings Inc. (NYSE:LH) by 84.6% in the third quarter, selling 7,840 shares and retaining 1,429 shares valued at approximately $410,000. Despite this reduction, other institutional investors increased their holdings, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $299.77 for Labcorp. The company recently exceeded quarterly EPS expectations, reported an 8.6% year-over-year revenue increase, and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.72.

feed.title: Manning & Napier Advisors LLC Sells 16,898 Shares of Kimberly-Clark Corporation $KMB
feed.summary: Manning & Napier Advisors LLC significantly reduced its stake in Kimberly-Clark Corporation by selling 16,898 shares, now holding 9,170 shares valued at $1.14 million. This move comes amid mixed institutional activity, with Vanguard and Norges Bank increasing their holdings, resulting in institutions owning 76.29% of KMB. The stock currently has an average "Hold" rating from analysts with a $120 price target and offers a 5.0% dividend yield.

feed.title: GWN Securities Inc. Lowers Stake in Pfizer Inc. $PFE
feed.summary: GWN Securities Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Pfizer Inc. by 96.3% during the third quarter, selling 232,693 shares and retaining 8,961 shares valued at $229,000. Despite this sell-off, other institutional investors have slightly increased their holdings. The article highlights Pfizer's positive clinical and regulatory developments and analyst sentiment, which largely suggests a "Hold" rating amid recent share weakness after 2026 guidance.

feed.title: Mosaic reports weak Q4 fertilizer sales amid market downturn
feed.summary: The Mosaic Company reported weak preliminary fourth-quarter 2025 fertilizer sales, with declines in both phosphate and potash volumes. Weak demand in North America and intensifying credit constraints in Brazil impacted results, leading the company to adjust production plans. Despite the downturn, industry expectations suggest record global phosphate and potash shipments in 2026.

feed.title: Fertilizer slump hits Mosaic’s Q4, but 2026 demand expected improve
feed.summary: The Mosaic Company (NYSE: MOS) reported weak preliminary Q4 2025 sales, with North American phosphate shipments down approximately 20% and significant underperformance in Brazil due to credit constraints and import competition. Despite the challenging quarter, the company anticipates a more constructive 2026 driven by grower nutrient replenishment, ongoing Chinese export restrictions, and positive price responses. Full Q4 2025 earnings are scheduled for release on February 24, 2026, with a conference call on February 25, 2026.

feed.title: Omnicom-IPG merger, Apple conflict triggered Samsung India’s Rs 300 crore media pitch
feed.summary: Samsung India has initiated a multi-agency media pitch for its Rs 300-crore advertising mandate, driven by concerns arising from the global merger between Interpublic Group (IPG) and Omnicom. This consolidation created a potential conflict of interest due to Omnicom's long-standing role as Apple's global media agency, a direct rival to Samsung. As a result, incumbent Lodestar (IPG-owned) and other Omnicom agencies were not invited to the pitch, which includes WPP Media, Publicis Groupe's Starcom, and independent agency Madison World.

feed.title: Synopsys to sell processor IP solutions business to GlobalFoundries
feed.summary: Synopsys has agreed to sell its processor IP solutions business to GlobalFoundries (GF) for an undisclosed price. The acquisition is expected to advance GlobalFoundries' physical AI roadmap, including MIPS, and strengthen its custom silicon capabilities, allowing Synopsys to focus on its remaining design IP portfolio. The deal, which will integrate Synopsys' ARC technologies with MIPS, aims to provide a broader processor IP portfolio for physical AI applications and is expected to close in the latter half of 2026.

feed.title: Protagonist Therapeutics to Participate in the 44th Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference 2026
feed.summary: Protagonist Therapeutics, Inc. announced that its President and CEO, Dinesh V. Patel, Ph.D., will present a company overview at the 44th Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference. The presentation is scheduled for Tuesday, January 13, 2026, at 8:15 AM PST. The company will also engage in one-on-one meetings during the conference, which runs from January 12-15, 2026, in San Francisco.

feed.title: This JM Smucker Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Friday
feed.summary: Several Wall Street analysts have downgraded the ratings of five major companies, including J. M. Smucker Co., Penumbra Inc., Ermenegildo Zegna NV, Marriott Vacations Worldwide Corp., and Shift4 Payments Inc. The downgrades reflect a less bullish outlook for these companies, with some also seeing their price targets lowered. These changes indicate a shift in analyst sentiment regarding their short to medium-term financial prospects.

feed.title: Rapid7 to Report Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results on February 10
feed.summary: Rapid7, Inc. (NASDAQ: RPD) announced it will release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results on Tuesday, February 10, 2026, after market close. The company will also host a conference call at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss its results and business outlook. A live webcast and press release will be available on Rapid7's investor relations website.

feed.title: National Energy Services Reunited Corp.'s (NASDAQ:NESR) P/E Is Still On The Mark Following 28% Share Price Bounce
feed.summary: National Energy Services Reunited Corp. (NASDAQ:NESR) has seen a 28% increase in its share price over the last month and a 99% gain over the past year. Despite a relatively high P/E ratio of 26.5x compared to the market average, the company's superior earnings growth, including a 33% increase last year and an estimated 79% growth for the coming year, appears to justify its valuation. Analysts' optimistic forecasts suggest sustained strong performance, leading shareholders to hold onto their positions.

feed.title: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. Purchases 4,517 Shares of F5, Inc. $FFIV
feed.summary: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. increased its stake in F5, Inc. by 3.2%, acquiring an additional 4,517 shares for a total of 146,855 shares valued at approximately $47.46 million. This move comes despite recent insider selling by F5 executives and analyst downgrades. The company faces a potential near-term headwind due to a securities class action related to an alleged cybersecurity incident.

feed.title: Global Payments Inc. $GPN Shares Sold by Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc.
feed.summary: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. reduced its stake in Global Payments Inc. by 2.9% in Q3, selling 17,905 shares, though institutional investors still hold approximately 89.8% of the company. Despite some analyst downgrades and a "Hold" consensus rating with an average price target of $99.05, Global Payments beat Q3 EPS estimates and set positive FY25 guidance. Insider activity shows both buying and selling, while the company's shares are trading near $74.82 with a P/E ratio of 10.51, and it recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.25.

feed.title: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. Sells 11,344 Shares of Genuine Parts Company $GPC
feed.summary: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. reduced its stake in Genuine Parts Company (NYSE:GPC) by 2.8% in the third quarter, selling 11,344 shares and now holding 391,776 shares valued at $54.3 million. Despite this sale, other institutional investors like Vanguard, State Street, Geode, Charles Schwab, and Norges Bank increased their holdings, bringing total institutional ownership to approximately 78.8%. Genuine Parts recently missed quarterly EPS estimates but surpassed revenue expectations and projects FY2025 EPS between $7.50 and $7.75, paying a quarterly dividend of $1.03 (3.0% yield) with an average analyst target of $148.

feed.title: TD Private Client Wealth LLC Reduces Stock Holdings in Kenvue Inc. $KVUE
feed.summary: TD Private Client Wealth LLC significantly reduced its stake in Kenvue Inc. by 80.8% in the third quarter, while other institutional investors like Renaissance Capital LLC and Farther Finance Advisors LLC increased their holdings. Director Jeffrey C. Smith also made a substantial insider purchase of 3.2 million shares. The company has an average "Hold" rating from analysts and recently released its quarterly earnings, beating estimates.

feed.title: Intercontinental Exchange Inc. $ICE Stock Position Raised by Nordea Investment Management AB
feed.summary: Nordea Investment Management AB has increased its stake in Intercontinental Exchange Inc. (NYSE:ICE) by 9.4%, holding 73,880 shares valued at approximately $12.43 million. Institutional investors now own 89.30% of ICE stock, and analysts widely recommend it as a "Buy" with an average price target of $193.50. The company reported strong quarterly earnings, meeting EPS estimates and exceeding revenue expectations.

(NYSE:TRGP) by 13.5% in the third quarter, now holding 146,368 shares valued at approximately $24.33 million. The company's stock has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with a target price of $211.36, and it recently announced a quarterly dividend of $1.00 per share. Targa Resources slightly missed Q3 earnings expectations but maintains a strong market presence in midstream energy services.

feed.title: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. Increases Stock Holdings in Omnicom Group Inc. $OMC
feed.summary: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. has increased its stake in Omnicom Group Inc. by 5.7%, now owning 569,113 shares valued at approximately $46.4 million. This move comes as Omnicom recently raised its quarterly dividend to $0.80, representing a 4.0% yield. Analyst sentiment for Omnicom is mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating, though some firms have increased their price targets.

feed.title: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. Buys 8,901 Shares of Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. $MAA

feed.title: MGO One Seven LLC Makes New $1.13 Million Investment in PPG Industries, Inc. $PPG

PPG Industries recently reported strong earnings, beating analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.71 per share.

feed.title: Nordea Investment Management AB Has $17.55 Million Stock Holdings in Regions Financial Corporation $RF
feed.summary: Nordea Investment Management AB significantly increased its stake in Regions Financial Corporation (NYSE:RF) by 60% in Q3, now holding 670,977 shares valued at $17.55 million. The company successfully beat Q3 EPS estimates, reporting $0.63 versus an expected $0.60, and generated $1.94 billion in revenue.

feed.title: Nordea Investment Management AB Has $20.37 Million Holdings in Garmin Ltd. $GRMN
feed.summary: Nordea Investment Management AB increased its stake in Garmin Ltd. by 6.3%, now holding 83,473 shares valued at $20.37 million. feed.title: Jefferies raises Fair Isaac stock price target to $2,200 on growth outlook
feed.summary: Jefferies has increased its price target for Fair Isaac (NYSE:FICO) to $2,200 from $2,100, maintaining a Buy rating due to an attractive growth outlook. The firm anticipates that concerns regarding regulatory uncertainty and market share loss will subside, projecting a 20-30% adjusted EPS compound annual growth rate for FICO over the next 3-5 years. Despite the stock trading slightly above its Fair Value, Jefferies considers its current valuation appealing given the strong growth prospects.

feed.title: MGO One Seven LLC Buys 14,699 Shares of DexCom, Inc. $DXCM

The stock currently trades around $69.24, falling within its 12-month range, and holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $86.30 from analysts.
